'''fapuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tableegh|tableegh]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-p-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tableegh|tableegh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fapuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæpichith|fæpichith]] || [[word:fæpichij|fæpichij]] || [[word:fæpichish|fæpichish]] || [[word:fæpichi|fæpichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fapupuchuth|fapupuchuth]] || [[word:fapupuchuj|fapupuchuj]] || [[word:fapupuchush|fapupuchush]] || [[word:fapupuchu|fapupuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fapuchuth|fapuchuth]] || [[word:fapuchuj|fapuchuj]] || [[word:fapuchush|fapuchush]] || [[word:fapuchu|fapuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fapufchuth|fapufchuth]] || [[word:fapufchuj|fapufchuj]] || [[word:fapufchush|fapufchush]] || [[word:fapufchuf|fapufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fapuchuthu|fapuchuthu]] || [[word:fapuchuju|fapuchuju]] || [[word:fapuchushu|fapuchushu]] || [[word:fapuchuku|fapuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fapuchuth|fapuchuth]] || [[word:fapuchuj|fapuchuj]] || [[word:fapuchush|fapuchush]] || [[word:fapuchu|fapuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fapuchuthul|fapuchuthul]] || [[word:fapuchujul|fapuchujul]] || [[word:fapuchushul|fapuchushul]] || [[word:fapuchukul|fapuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fapuchuthuthu|fapuchuthuthu]] || [[word:fapuchujuju|fapuchujuju]] || [[word:fapuchushushu|fapuchushushu]] || [[word:fapuchuku|fapuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fapuchuthun|fapuchuthun]] || [[word:fapuchujun|fapuchujun]] || [[word:fapuchushun|fapuchushun]] || [[word:fapuchukun|fapuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fapuchuthuoro|fapuchuthuoro]] || [[word:fapuchujuoro|fapuchujuoro]] || [[word:fapuchushuoro|fapuchushuoro]] || [[word:fapuchukuoro|fapuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
